item.title: (b) CEE - Homogenous
item.description: 1. 코시-오일러 제차미분방정식 형태1 $$ \begin{aligned} &x^2y''+axy'+by=0 \\ \\ &D^2+\left(a-1\right)D+b=0 \end{aligned} $$ 형태2 $$ \begin{aligned} &xy^{\prime}+ay=0 \\ \\ &D+a=0 \end{aligned} $$ 2. 서로 다른, 실수 해 $$ \begin{aligned} &D=\alpha,\beta \\ \\ &y=c_1x^{\alpha}+c_2x^{\beta} \end{aligned} $$ example1) $$x^2y''-4xy'+6y=0$$ sol $$ \begin{aligned} &\left(D-3\right)\left(D-2\right)=0\rightarrow D=3,2 \\ \\ &y=c_1x^3+c_2x^2 \end{aligned} $$ example2) $x^2y''-xy'-y=0$ $D^2-2D-1=0\rightarrow D=1\pm\sqrt{2}$ $y=c_1x^{1+\sqrt{2}}+c_2x^{1-\sqrt{2}}$ example3) $xy''-y'=0$ $D\left(D-2\right)=0\rightarrow D=2,0$ $y=c_1x^2+c_2$ example4)
